source_pr.title: statistics: add tests for global-stats when add and delete a single partition
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #xxx <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: 
1. Add tests for global-stats when adding and deleting single partitions.
2. fix the race test for `TestCMSketchCodingTopN`

### What is changed and how it works?

* The change in files `statistics/cmsketch_test.go` and `statistics/statistics_test.go` are used to avoid the race test.
* Add tests for global-stats when we add or delete a partition.

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: avoid race test for testMergeTopN | rand.Seed(time.Now().Unix()) (statistics/handle/update_test.go)
failure_signature: avoid race test for testMergeTopN | rand.Seed(time.Now().Unix()) (statistics/handle/update_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: avoid race test for testMergeTopN | rand.Seed(time.Now().Unix()) (statistics/handle/update_test.go).
fix_pattern: avoid race test for testMergeTopN | rand.Seed(time.Now().Unix()) (statistics/handle/update_test.go)

evidence: evidence: avoid race test for testMergeTopN | rand.Seed(time.Now().Unix()) (statistics/handle/update_test.go)
files: executor/analyze_test.go, statistics/cmsketch_test.go, statistics/handle/handle.go, statistics/handle/handle_test.go, statistics/handle/update_test.go, statistics/statistics_test.go
